text: How to Maintain Age
You should hold your knife once in a while, usually before using and chopping vegetables.
So this is something ongoing to maintain the age.
How to do so? Well, hold the honing steel tip up at 45 degree angle.
So let's say this is 90 degree angle, 45 will be about half.
The cutting edge of the knife should rest on the steel at the desired angle.
So this is 90 degree angle, half will be about 45, then half again will be about 22,
which is good for this knife.
So then pull the knife 2 to 4 times across and up the steel and moving from heel to point.
So just like so, heel to point.
And then go under, keep the same angle
and do the same thing.
And do it again.
Again.
And again.
So for comfort, I also like to move my left hand here, which is the hand that holds the steel.
And repeat the operation several times.
So make sure you are going from heel to point, keeping the same angle on both sides.
When you're done, clean the knife.
Before using it.
And as you can see, it's black.
This is some of the metal.
This is a honing steel, not to be confused with a sharpening steel.
So know what you are buying.
